findings.description: Coverage quality gate added to reusable-build.yml with 80% threshold, configurable via inputs
Created reusable-deploy.yml for GitOps CD promotion (Stage 4) with monorepo/gitops-repo modes, health checks, and automated rollback
Created reusable-post-deploy.yml for post-deployment verification (Stage 5) with health checks, Prometheus/alert checks, DORA event recording, and rollback trigger
Updated ci-pipeline.yml to wire deploy + post-deploy stages after tests, enabled coverage gate on build stage
Updated Makefile with test-smoke, test-e2e, coverage-gate, compose-up, compose-down targets
Fixed YAML parsing issues in reusable-deploy.yml and reusable-post-deploy.yml (heredoc and inline Python multi-line strings)
Fixed 8 remaining ruff lint issues in compute/metrics.py and tests/unit/test_workflow_validation.py
All 17 pre-commit hooks pass, all 130 unit tests pass
Committed 30 files (2162 insertions, 985 deletions) to feat/ci-cd-stages-discovery branch

decision: All 5 stages of CI/CD pipeline are now implemented. Branch is ready for PR review and merge to main.
